sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41243" key="e)pitala/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτᾰλάριος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰρ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n41243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a basket,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἀφροδίτη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.323a</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
